title: Ubiquiti UACC-Rack-Shelf-CLV for U-Rack-6U-TL
description: Well-crafted shelf that fits perfectly into the U-Rack-6U-TL cabinet. The shelf can also be mounted into any standard 19" rack. It has a depth of 250 mm and occupies 1U of rack height The shelf is made of cold-rolled carbon steel and has a load capacity of 20 kg
